title: The Substance
tmdbOverview: A fading celebrity decides to use a black market drug, a cell-replicating substance that temporarily creates a younger, better version of herself.
synopsis: The Substance is a 2024 horror, science fiction and thriller film from United Kingdom and United States. It holds a solid 7.2 rating on IMDb. It's one of the titles we feature across our 2020s and genre rankings. It carries a R certification (US rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
